criteria.name: AI-Powered Tools
criteria.description: Presence and quality of AI-driven features such as object removal, background replacement, style transfer, image enhancement, and intelligent editing assistance.
criteria.sources: Guru, YouTube, Zapier, Kripesh Adwani, Invideo AI, Reddit

criteria.name: User Interface and Ease of Use
criteria.description: Intuitiveness and user-friendliness of the app's interface, making it accessible for both beginners and professionals.

criteria.name: Versatility and Functionality
criteria.description: Range of editing tools and features available, including basic adjustments, filters, effects, and advanced capabilities like layering and masking.
criteria.sources: Zapier, Kripesh Adwani, Invideo AI, YouTube

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on multiple platforms such as iOS, Android, Windows, and macOS.

criteria.name: Price
criteria.description: Cost of the app, including subscription fees, in-app purchases, and the availability of a free version.

criteria.name: Object Identification
criteria.description: Ability of the app to identify objects, landmarks, and other elements within a photo using AI.

criteria.name: Real-time Guidance
criteria.description: Provides real-time guidance to help users create better compositions, identify compelling subjects, find creative angles, and use lighting to their advantage.

criteria.name: Video Editing Capabilities
criteria.description: Ability to perform video editing tasks, such as cutting, trimming, adding captions, and generating short clips from longer videos.
